releaseNotes:
• Fixed a crash in multi-view: after streams reconnected, the picture cells could slip onto hardware decoding and overwhelm lower-memory boxes. They now stay on the safe decoder.
• Search: "On now" and "Coming up" results work again — the programme-guide search index is rebuilt automatically if it was empty.
• Removed the experimental dwell preview from the Movies/Series grids (live preview stays in the TV guide).
